heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s. Winds variable to north around 5 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear. Lows from the mid 40s to lower 50s west of the Greens, and the mid 30s to lower 40s east, with some lower 30s in the cold spots. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast, except south 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sun filtering through increasing high clouds, mainly west of the Greens. Highs from the mid 60s to around 70 east of the Greens, and upper 60s to lower 70s west, and some mid 70s possible in the St. Lawrence Valley. South to southeast winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.
